prerequisites: An active Shortcut account with access to the workspace whose data you want to extract.
A Shortcut API token generated from your account settings. The token must be supplied as the connector's required api_key_2 field.
A start_date value to bound the extraction window (required by the connector).
Network access over HTTPS to the Shortcut REST API at https://api.app.shortcut.com/.

authMethods.name: API token (Shortcut-Token header)
authMethods.summary: Shortcut authenticates each request with an API token sent in the Shortcut-Token header. Provide this token in the connector's api_key_2 secret field. Generate it at https://app.shortcut.com/settings/account/api-tokens. Tokens grant complete access to your Shortcut account, so store the value securely. The legacy token query-parameter method is deprecated; the connector uses the header.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Shortcut API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Shortcut and open https://app.shortcut.com/settings/account/api-tokens (Settings > Account > API Tokens). Create a new token and copy its value immediately. The token provides complete access to your Shortcut account, so treat it as a secret.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the generated token into the required api_key_2 field. The connector sends it on every request in the Shortcut-Token header to authenticate against the Shortcut REST API v3.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest point from which records should be extracted. This bounds the initial sync window.

setupSteps.title: Optionally set a query
setupSteps.body: If you only need a filtered subset of data, set the optional query field. Leave it empty to use the connector default.

setupSteps.title: Mind the rate limit
setupSteps.body: The Shortcut REST API limits requests to 200 per minute. Requests over that limit are not processed and return a 429 (Too Many Requests) response, so schedule large syncs accordingly.

sources.title: Shortcut REST API v3 - Rate Limiting
